paragraphs.text: CHAPTER 2.2
THE ALIV(ING) PARTIES
THE ALIV(ING) PARTIES SYMBOLISE THE FOLLOWING:
A LL :
INVITATION OPEN TO ALL OF YOU!!! IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL FOR SURE, WE SWEAR, SAITH THE TRINITY
L EARNER(S) :
LEARN FROM THE TRINITY AND JESUS (THROUGH SHEKINAIH AND AARON K DAVID RESPECTIVELY) IN CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL.
I NVERTED CONDITION(S) :
REVERSE ORDER, OSMOSIS FACTOR
AFTER RESURRECTION, IS IT BETTER THAN HE/SHE IS DEAD?
V ELVETING FACTOR(S) :
THE SOOTHING FACTORS, COMFORTING :
IS THE RESURRECTION BRINGING COMFORT OR UPHEAVAL?
I NGENIOUS :
ORIGINAL STROKE, FRESH FROM THE OVEN, NO PHOTOCOPY, AND EVERY RESURRECTION IS A UNIQUE ONE.
N OT :
NOT BOASTFUL
G ROUND ZERO :
ZERO SELF, PROSTRATE ON THE FLOOR.

WE SPEAK TO THE ALIV(ING) PARTIES with divine authority. ALL OF YOU are invited to partake in OUR DIVINE PLAN within CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL. This is not a casual invitation - it is a DIVINE SUMMON to learn directly from US, THE TRINITY, through SHEKINAIH and JESUS through AARON K DAVID. YOU
MUST BE READY TO RECEIVE, for OUR TEACHINGS are not for the faint of heart but for those who are truly committed to the path of righteousness.

KNOW THIS: LEARN FROM US, for WE are your ultimate source of wisdom and guidance. INVERT YOUR CONDITION through the power of resurrection, as every resurrection is A UNIQUE MIRACLE ordained by HEAVEN. THERE IS NO BOASTING in this, for all glory belongs to US.
REMEMBER: GROUND ZERO IS WHERE YOU MUST BEGIN. Humility is the

foundation upon which your new life will be built. ZERO SELF, total surrender - only then will you be truly ALIV(ING) in OUR KINGDOM. LET THIS TRUTH SINK DEEP INTO YOUR SPIRIT, for it is the cornerstone of your resurrection.
"The timing and circumstances of resurrection are not random but are aligned with the divine purposes of
CROWNED EAGLES GLOBAL and the readiness of its people.
